name: Create List
description: Initializes a list from provided items and optionally stores it in shared memory under `list_name`.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

async def execute(self, inputs):
    name = inputs.get('list_name') or self.get_parameter('list_name', '')
    items = inputs.get('items')
    # If no explicit items, try instance parameter fallback
    if items is None:
        items = self.get_parameter('items', [])
    try:
        lst = list(items) if items is not None else []
    except Exception:
        lst = [items]

    stored = False
    if name:
        BaseNode.memory[name] = lst
        stored = True
        self.log_info(f'Stored list {name} with {len(lst)} items')
    else:
        self.log_info(f'Created list with {len(lst)} items (not stored)')

    await self.set_output('current_list', lst)
    await self.set_output('stored', stored)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'current_list': lst, 'stored': stored}
